question_intent: Average goals scored by teams that lost to teams in the Eastern Conference in the 2006 season

plan.question_intent: Average goals scored by teams that lost to teams in the Eastern Conference in the 2006 season
plan.detail_query: SELECT leaf_1.year, leaf_1.tmid, leaf_1.name, leaf_1.gf FROM (SELECT t.year, t.tmid, t.name, t.gf FROM teams AS t JOIN teamvsteam AS tvt ON t.tmid = tvt.tmid JOIN teams AS ot ON tvt.oppid = ot.tmid JOIN abbrev AS ab ON ot.confid = ab.code WHERE (t.year = 2006) AND (ab.fullname = 'Eastern Conference') AND (tvt.l = 1)) AS leaf_1

build_logs.notes: Average goals scored by teams that lost to teams in the Eastern Conference in the 2006 season

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT t.year, t.tmid, t.name, t.gf
FROM teams AS t
JOIN teamvsteam AS tvt ON t.tmid = tvt.tmid
JOIN teams AS ot ON tvt.oppid = ot.tmid
JOIN abbrev AS ab ON ot.confid = ab.code
WHERE (t.year = 2006) AND (ab.fullname = 'Eastern Conference') AND (tvt.l = 1)) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

SELECT AVG(leaf_1.gf)
FROM (SELECT t.year, t.tmid, t.name, t.gf
FROM teams AS t
JOIN teamvsteam AS tvt ON t.tmid = tvt.tmid
JOIN teams AS ot ON tvt.oppid = ot.tmid
JOIN abbrev AS ab ON ot.confid = ab.code
WHERE (t.year = 2006) AND (ab.fullname = 'Eastern Conference') AND (tvt.l = 1)) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT AVG(leaf_1.gf) AS avg_goals_scored
FROM (SELECT t.name AS team_name, t.year, t.gf
FROM teams AS t
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
JOIN abbrev AS ab ON t.confid = ab.code
WHERE ((t.lgid = 'NHL')) AND ((t.confid = ab.code)) AND ((ab.fullname = 'Eastern Conference')) AND ((a.award = 'Jack Adams'))) AS leaf_1

SELECT AVG(leaf_1.gf) AS avg_goals_scored
FROM (SELECT t.name AS team_name, t.year, t.gf
FROM teams AS t
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
JOIN abbrev AS ab ON t.confid = ab.code
WHERE ((t.lgid = 'NHL')) AND ((t.confid = ab.code)) AND ((ab.fullname = 'Eastern Conference')) AND ((a.award = 'Jack Adams'))) AS leaf_1

question: What is the average value of `gf` across all losses by teams in the Eastern Conference during the year 2006?
